name: luisracosta-hq
mission: Build and maintain Luis Alberto Ramírez Acosta's digital ecosystem — personal brand, content authority, and operational intelligence dashboard. Every artifact should reinforce Luis's position as an AI-native technical co-founder serving Mexico/LatAm.
goals: Publish and maintain luisracosta.com as a world-class personal authority site
Keep Mission Control HQ updated as the real-time operational dashboard
Produce one high-quality article per week (research-backed, Luis's voice)
Maintain knowledge base as the single source of truth about Luis and EVEN

budget.notes: Claude Max subscription. Budget is shared across all agents in this company. Perplexity Computer operates outside this budget.
